entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the target crop of the study for pod development analysis

entities.name: ARACHIS DURANENSIS
entities.description: A wild relative of peanut used for genome-wide identification of FAR1 genes

entities.name: ARACHIS IPAENSIS
entities.description: A wild relative of peanut used for genome-wide identification of FAR1 genes

entities.name: ARACHIS MONTICOLA
entities.description: A wild relative of peanut used for genome-wide identification of FAR1 genes

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: Glycine max, a related species used for comparative genome-wide identification of FAR1 genes

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: Model plant where FAR1 transcription family was initially identified

entities.name: FAR1 GENE FAMILY
entities.description: Transcription family involved in phytochrome A-mediated far-red light signaling and plant growth

entities.name: PHYTOCHROME A
entities.description: Protein (phyA) that mediates far-red light signaling

entities.name: FAR-RED LIGHT SIGNALING
entities.description: Signaling process mediated by phytochrome A involving FAR1 genes

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: General biological processes controlled by the FAR1 gene family

entities.name: POD DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of pod formation in peanut, potentially influenced by specific FAR1 genes

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE IDENTIFICATION
entities.description: Systematic approach to identify all members of a gene family across the genome

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of evolutionary relationships and substitution rates (Ks and Ka) of genes

entities.name: SYNTENY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of the physical co-localization of genetic loci on the same chromosome within an individual or between species

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Study of the complete set of RNA transcripts to determine tissue- and stage-specific expression patterns

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Quantitative real-time PCR used to confirm the expression levels of specific genes

entities.name: POLYPLOIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the number of chromosome sets, analyzed via FAR1 genes

entities.name: EVOLUTION
entities.description: The genetic change in the FAR1 family over time

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild peanut species for cultivation, analyzed via FAR1 genes

entities.name: AHY_A10G049543
entities.description: A candidate FAR1 gene specifically expressed in peanut peg and pod
